CustomField.description: Enable this to override the floating rent reset date. Once enabled, the system will refrain from calculating the rent slip reset date based on the default logic. Instead, it will retain the user-entered reset date and fetch the index rate for precise calculation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enable this to override the floating rent reset date. Once enabled, the system will refrain from calculating the rent slip reset date based on the default logic. Instead, it will retain the user-entered reset date and fetch the index rate for precise calculation.
CustomField.label: Rate Reset Date Override
